<style>

.container{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px}
.btn-primary{display:inline-block;padding:18px 40px;background:#0ea5e9;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;transition:all .3s}
.btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 10px 40px #0ea5e950}

.hero{padding:120px 0 80px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f172a 0%,#1e293b 100%);color:#fff}
.hero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:64px;align-items:center}
.hero h1{font-size:48px;font-weight:800;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:20px}
.hero p{font-size:18px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);margin-bottom:32px}
.hero-avatar{width:280px;height:280px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0ea5e9,#06b6d4);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:120px;margin:0 auto}

.results{padding:60px 0;background:#0ea5e908}
.results-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:32px;text-align:center}
.result-card{padding:32px}
.result-card .number{font-size:40px;font-weight:800;color:#0ea5e9;margin-bottom:8px}
.result-card .label{font-size:14px;color:#6b7280;font-weight:500}
.result-card .client{font-size:12px;color:#9ca3af;margin-top:4px}

.services{padding:80px 0}
.section-title{text-align:center;font-size:36px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:48px}
.services-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:32px}
.service-card{padding:40px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:16px;transition:all .3s}
.service-card:hover{border-color:#0ea5e9;transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.08)}
.service-icon{font-size:40px;margin-bottom:20px}
.service-card h3{font-size:20px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px}
.service-card p{color:#6b7280}

.cta{padding:80px 0;text-align:center;background:#0f172a;color:#fff}
.cta h2{font-size:36px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:16px}
